gauge.name: Hubbard Creek below Albany

impacts.statement: Severe flooding of pasture land and oil fields will occur. Secondary roads and low water crossings will be flooded and impassible.
Flooding of pasture land and oil fields will occur. Secondary roads and low water crossings will be flooded and impassible.
Flooding of pastures and oil field areas will occur. Secondary roads and low water crossings will be flooded and impassible.
Minor overbank flooding of pasture land and oil fields will occur. Secondary roads and low water crossings will be flooded.
Minor overbank flooding of pasture land and oil fields will occur. Secondary roads and low water crossings will be flooded.

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
